div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px;

div.p: Select a report to view the full chart and analysis

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;

div.p: Track and manage the total work remaining within a sprint.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #fff3cd; color: #856404; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Visualize completed work versus total scope.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #d4edda; color: #155724; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Predict work your team can commit to in future sprints.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #e8f0fe; color: #185FA5; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;
background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #ede7f6; color: #4527a0; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Time to ship work through the deployment pipeline.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #e3f2fd; color: #0c447c; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Track story points created per week/month.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;

div.p: Analyze team performance using Machine Learning.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #e3f2fd; color: #0c447c; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Monitor blockers and flagged tickets in real time.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #fff3cd; color: #856404; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Distribution of all tickets by status.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #fff3cd; color: #856404; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; margin-bottom: 32px;
div.p: Lancez ou rejoignez une réunion vidéo directement depuis le dashboard.

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #e8f0fe; color: #185FA5; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4682b4 0%, #5b9bd5 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;

select.style: padding: 10px 15px; border: 2px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 6px; min-width: 300px; font-size: 14px; background: white; color: #333; cursor: pointer;

div.style: position: relative; height: 400px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #185FA5 0%, #378ADD 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #534AB7 0%, #7F77DD 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
position: relative; height: 350px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #5DCAA5 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
padding: 6px 16px; border: 1.5px solid #4f8ef7; background: #eef3ff; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #4f8ef7;
padding: 6px 16px; border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0; background: white; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #888;

span.style: background: #E1F5EE; color: #085041; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500;
background: #EEEDFE; color: #3C3489; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: white; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-end;
font-size: 11px; color: #888; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase;

button.name: action_analyze_project
action_analyze_team
action_clear_analysis

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 14px;
background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); text-align: center;

span.style: background: #f0f0f0; color: #555; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; margin-bottom: 10px;
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; margin-bottom: 8px;
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; margin-bottom: 10px;

div.div: Run an analysis to see recommendations

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 14px;
background: white; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 14px;
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; margin-bottom: 12px;
display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 6px; height: 80px;
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; margin-bottom: 10px;
margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
div.div: Select a project and click Analyze
scikit-learn · Random Forest · TF-IDF · Naive Bayes

div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c2340 0%, #1a2855 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 25px;
text-align: center; padding: 15px; background: #f0f4ff; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #4f8ef7;
text-align: center; padding: 15px; background: #f0fff4; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #3ecf8e;
text-align: center; padding: 15px; background: #fff8f0; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #f5c842;
text-align: center; padding: 15px; background: #fff0f0; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #ff5c5c;
text-align: center; padding: 15px; background: #fff8f0; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #ff9640;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffc107 0%, #FF9800 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;

tr.td: Save the record to see data

div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #5DCAA5 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;

select.style: padding: 10px 15px; border: 2px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 6px; min-width: 300px; font-size: 14px; background: white; color: #333; cursor: pointer;

div.style: position: relative; height: 400px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #185FA5 0%, #378ADD 100%); color: white; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
position: relative; height: 350px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px;
text-align: center; background: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #4472C4;
text-align: center; background: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #ED7D31;
text-align: center; background: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #dc3545;
text-align: center; background: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #28a745;

div.div: Entrez le code ou le lien

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px;

div.p: Google Meet ne peut pas s'afficher dans un iframe. Cliquez ci-dessous pour ouvrir dans un nouvel onglet.
